🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert SVG to PNG

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your SVG files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

SVG is a vector format, perfect for logos and icons, but many tools and platforms need a raster PNG instead. Your browser is actually the most accurate SVG renderer there is, so converting in-browser gives a crisp, correct PNG — with nothing uploaded to a server.

How to convert

  1. Drag your SVG files into the box above.
  2. Your browser renders each SVG and exports it as PNG.
  3. Download the PNG files.

FAQ

What resolution do I get?

By default the PNG matches the SVG's intrinsic size. See the high-resolution page to export at 2x or 4x.

Related converters

PNG to JPG

VaultConvert — free file converters that run entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
